name: iOS Download Lifecycle
description: Verify download UI states on iOS. Navigate to model list, find a model card, and verify download button and download state indicators are present.

steps.description: Verify Models tab is visible with tab bar.
Verify the Get More Models section is present for download options.
Verify at least one model card is visible in the hub.
Tap on the first available model card to see details.
Wait for model detail view or sheet to appear.
Verify download-related UI elements exist in detail view.
Dismiss detail view if a back/close button is available.
Verify we are back at the Model Hub.
